arguments.argument:
image_speed=0 image_index=1 bossProgress=0 moveSpd=4
topBorder=64 bottomBorder=room_height-48 leftBorder=18 rightBorder=50
maxLife=1000 life=global.finalBossHP

superAimTime=0
